---
name: Skill Request
about: Request a new scientific tool or topic
labels: skill-request
---

**Tool or topic name**
e.g. Salmon, CellRanger, MACS3

**Category**
Pick one: genomics-bioinformatics / structural-biology-drug-discovery / biostatistics / proteomics-protein-engineering / systems-biology-multiomics / cell-biology / scientific-computing / scientific-writing / data-visualization / lab-automation / molecular-biology

**Skill type**
Pick one: pipeline / toolkit / database / guide

**Use case**
What analysis or task would this skill support?

**Official documentation URL**
Link to the tool's docs, GitHub repo, or paper.
